parameters.name: sortmethod
parameters.label: Sort
parameters.description: Determines how the table will be sorted.

parameters.name: name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: When using Sort Specify Row/Column Name, specify the name in this parameter. If the sort name does not find a match, the output will be unsorted.

parameters.name: index
parameters.label: Index
parameters.description: When using Sort Specify Row/Column Index, specify the index in this parameter. If the sort index is -1 or out of bounds, the output will be unsorted.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.label: Seed
parameters.description: The random seed when is set to .

parameters.name: ignorecase
parameters.label: Ignore Case
parameters.description: Ignores case sensitivity when Sort Order is set to Alphabetical or Alphabetical with Numbers.

parameters.name: preservefirst
parameters.label: Preserve First
parameters.description: Does not resort the first row or column (depending if is set to Rows or Columns).

parameters.name: unique
parameters.label: Unique Output
parameters.description: Remove duplicate rows/column entries in the sorted row/column.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.
